Document:
# Arborkin
They can't wear shoes, but are not slowed by Kudzu. They get hungry and thirsty slower. Their "blood" is tree sap and can't be metabolised from Iron. Being plants, Weed Killer poisons them, while Robust Harvest heals them (but not without risk when overused!)
They take [color=#1e90ff]30% less Blunt damage, 20% less Slash damage, and 10% less Piercing damage[/color]; but [color=#ffa500]50% more Heat damage, 20% more Shock damage, and they can easily catch on fire when receiving enough Heat damage from *any* source.[/color]
## Make Like A Tree And Leave
Being exposed to too much Robust Harvest will cause a Arborkin to grow out of control, turning into an immobile tree (dropping all their equipment). Cutting down the tree will "restore" the Arborkin to their mobile state.
## Arborkin Nymphs
After death, a Arborkin can voluntarily destroy their own body, releasing their "internal organs" as three Nymphs, with the player taking control of the Brain Nymph. It can talk but has no hands or inventory, and can't do much.
After 10 minutes, a Nymph can reform into a whole Arborkin. This will be a new randomised body with a random name, and there will be little to no evidence beyond their word about who they were before.
